queries.question: For each car, list the corresponding safety features.
queries.sql: select cars.make , safety_features.name from Cars_Safety_Features join Safety_Features on Cars_Safety_Features.featureId = Safety_Features.featureId join Cars on Cars_Safety_Features.carId = Cars.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?make ?name WHERE {
  ?cars_safety_features a :Cars_Safety_Features .
  ?safety_features a :Safety_Features .
  ?cars_safety_features p:hasSafety_Features ?safety_features .
  ?cars a :Cars .
  ?cars_safety_features p:hasCars ?cars .
  ?cars p:make ?make .
  ?safety_features p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Which safety features are associated with each car?
queries.sql: SELECT Safety_Features.name  from Cars_Safety_Features join Safety_Features on Cars_Safety_Features.featureId = Safety_Features.featureId join Cars on Cars_Safety_Features.carId = Cars.id   GROUP BY Cars_Safety_Features.featureId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Cars_Safety_Features.carId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Cars)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which safety features are associated with each car?
